ops.title: cc-notes task start fails on detached HEAD (jj colocated repos) — use task claim instead
ops.body: In a colocated jj repo the git HEAD is usually detached, and `cc-notes task start <id>` refuses with "detached HEAD; cannot start a task here" (start records a branch). `cc-notes task claim <id>` works fine and takes the lease. Related: [[jj-colocated-use-jj-not-git-stash]], [[uses-jj-locally-sometimes]].
